enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about a frustrating day dealing with multiple tech failures: his repaired Mac stopped working again after getting it back, his Windows computer has a broken keyboard and USB port, and he struggled to get a 125GB SD card of LibriVox audiobooks recognized by his phone and MP3 player.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Suspects phones offer large SD card support but it doesn't actually work reliably in practice
Values having a large portable collection of LibriVox history, philosophy, and religion audiobooks
